seo.title: Building AI Email Assistant with Llama Stack + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai email assistant with Llama Stack + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building an AI Email Assistant with Llama Stack enables powerful email processing, intent detection, draft generation, and approval workflows using Meta's standardized agent interface. Guardrails are essential due to the high-risk nature of email handling, where errors can lead to PII leaks, inappropriate communications, or confidentiality breaches. Vex integration provides robust verification to mitigate these risks while preserving agent performance.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Email Assistant Architecture with Llama Stack
architectureOverview.description:
The AI Email Assistant leverages Llama Stack's agentic framework with components for intent detection, content generation, attachment processing, and approval workflows. Incoming emails trigger the Llama agent via the stack client, which uses memory banks for conversation history and tools for email operations like drafting and sending. Safety shields filter outputs, but common failures like false positives and schema mismatches require post-processing verification.

The workflow begins with email ingestion, followed by intent classification (reply, forward, archive), draft generation with PII redaction, attachment validation, and human-in-loop approval before sending. Llama Stack's standardized SDK handles tool calls and memory retrieval, but Vex wraps responses to enforce domain-specific checks like tone and recipient validation.

This architecture scales for high-volume email processing while maintaining compliance through layered safety mechanisms.

risks.name: PII Leakage in Drafts
risks.description: Agent generates email drafts containing unredacted personal identifiable information from memory retrievals
risks.mitigation: Vex PII filtering on all generated content before approval workflow

risks.name: Inappropriate Tone Detection Failure
risks.description: Safety shield false positives block benign professional language, or misses sarcastic/inappropriate phrasing
risks.mitigation: Multi-layered tone analysis with Vex semantic verification

risks.name: Invalid Recipient Selection
risks.description: Agent selects incorrect recipients due to hallucinated memory associations
risks.mitigation: Recipient validation against verified contact lists via Vex checks

risks.name: Confidentiality Breach
risks.description: Memory retrieval includes sensitive internal documents in external email responses
risks.mitigation: Content classification and confidentiality enforcement with Vex policies

implementation.title: Email Ingestion and Intent Detection
implementation.description: Process incoming email using Llama Stack client to detect intent and extract key parameters

implementation.title: Draft Generation with Attachments
implementation.description: Generate email draft with attachment handling using Llama Stack tools

implementation.title: Memory Bank Context Retrieval
implementation.description: Retrieve conversation history and document context for informed responses

implementation.title: Tool Execution for Email Operations
implementation.description: Execute email operations through Llama Stack tool calling

vexIntegration.title: PII and Confidentiality Filtering
vexIntegration.description: Wrap Llama Stack responses with Vex PII detection and confidentiality enforcement

vexIntegration.title: Tone and Content Accuracy Verification
vexIntegration.description: Post-process agent outputs for tone appropriateness and factual accuracy

vexIntegration.title: Full Agent Turn Verification Wrapper
vexIntegration.description: Complete wrapper for Llama Stack agent turns with comprehensive Vex checks

cta.description: Install Vex SDK today and wrap your Llama Stack agents with enterprise-grade verification to eliminate email compliance risks.
